description_long: This is a modern quadcopter drone with a sleek, carbon-fiber-like body and four large propellers mounted at the ends of its X-shaped arms. The central body is compact and streamlined, featuring a visible camera module and some exposed wiring and electronic components on the top. The arms are slightly curved and robust, designed to provide stability and durability during flight. The propellers are wide and aerodynamically shaped, optimized for efficient lift and maneuverability. Small colored markings and details are present near the motor mounts, adding to its technical appearance. The landing gear consists of short, fixed legs integrated into the arm structure, providing ground clearance for the camera and electronics.
description: A sleek, carbon-fiber quadcopter drone with four large propellers, a visible camera, and integrated fixed landing legs. The body features exposed electronics and colored details for a technical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera module and exposed electronics, with all four propellers clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with the camera less visible, highlighting the streamlined back and propeller arrangement.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the X-shaped arm configuration and central body details.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view showing both the camera and the colored electronic components, as well as the propeller layout.
